note: Created integration test infrastructure with Testcontainers for PostgreSQL and Redis. Added Testcontainers.PostgreSql and Testcontainers.Redis NuGet packages. Created shared PostgresRedisFixture, IntegrationTestFactory (WebApplicationFactory), and 8 integration tests covering: health endpoint with real DB/Redis, events endpoint from real Postgres, cache-aside pattern with real Redis, data persistence, migrations, and active event filtering.
